---
title: "Installation"
---

`xileh` targets Python 3.11+.

## From PyPI

```bash
pip install xileh
```

## From source

```bash
git clone git@github.com:bsdlab/xileh.git
cd xileh
pip install .
# or, for an editable install during development:
pip install -e .
```

## Development environment

The project uses [uv](https://github.com/astral-sh/uv) for dependency
management. To set up a development environment with all optional groups:

```bash
uv sync --extra all
```

Optional dependency groups:

- `dev` — `pytest`, `pytest-cov`, `ruff`, `ipython`
- `docs` — Quarto / quartodoc documentation tooling
- `build` — `build`, `twine` for packaging
- `all` — everything above
